parameter.defaultValue: 2. add and reduce the items in cart and menu screen.
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 3. edit the item from cart screen and check its editing correctly.
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 4. Host Preorders First and Invitee Does Not Preorder & add items with spcl instrn and without
parameter.name: Text
